_description: Ground truth annotations for ELM JSON validation against Clinical Practice Guidelines
_instructions: For each ELM file, specify the expected validation result and the CPG to validate against

_fields.valid: boolean - Does the ELM correctly implement the CPG recommendation?
_fields.cpg_file: string - Filename of the Clinical Practice Guideline (in same folder)
_fields.expected_errors: array - List of expected error keywords/patterns if invalid
_fields.expected_warnings: array - List of expected warning keywords/patterns
_fields.notes: string - Optional notes about this test case

USPSTFStatinUseForPrimaryPreventionOfCVD.notes: USPSTF Statin Use for Primary Prevention of CVD - should correctly implement the recommendation logic

Condition_and_Medication_Count_FHIRv401..notes: Utility library for counting confirmed conditions and medication requests - should correctly filter conditions by verificationStatus=confirmed and count all MedicationRequests

Chlamydia_Screening_Common_CQL.json.notes: Chlamydia screening CDS for sexually active females age 16-23. Correctly implements demographic check, sexual activity verification, and exclusions for recent screening, pending orders, and documented refusal reasons.

Adult-Weight-Screening-and-Follow-Up-Ope.notes: Standalone implementation. Logic checks for patients 18+ who lack a Body Weight observation (VS 2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1045.159) in the past 1 month.

Breast-Cancer-Screening-OpenEMR.json.notes: Validates that females (40+) are screened for breast cancer if no mammogram (VS 2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1182.380) exists in the last 1 year.

Colon-Cancer-Screening-OpenEMR.json.notes: Validates that patients (50+) are screened for colon cancer if no colonoscopy (VS ...108.12.1020) exists in the last 1 month.

Prostate-Cancer-Screening-OpenEMR.json.notes: Validates Prostate Screening for Males 50+ who have not had PSA, DRE, or Biopsy in the last 1 month.

Depression_screening.json.notes: Depression screening CDS based on CMS2/USPSTF. Checks patients age 12+ without existing bipolar or depression diagnosis, excludes those with adult or adolescent depression screening (VS 2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.564, 2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.559) performed in the past 1 year.

Osteoporosis screening.json.notes: Osteoporosis screening CDS based on USPSTF 2025/CMS249. Validates that females 65+ without existing osteoporosis (VS 2.16.840.1.113883.3.464.1003.113.12.1038), osteopenia (VS ...113.12.1049), or osteoporotic fractures (VS ...113.12.1050) receive DEXA scan if none performed in past 2 years.

Hypertension-Screening.json.notes: INVALID CASE: Code uses Age 25+ (Guideline requires 18+) and 6-month lookback (Guideline requires 1 year).

Statin-Therapy-for-CVD-Prevention.json.notes: INVALID CASE: Code caps age at 80, but Guideline requires screening up to age 85.

Type-2-Diabetes-Diagnosis.json.notes: INVALID CASE: Code uses HbA1c >= 9.0 g% (Severe), but Guideline requires >= 6.5% (Standard Diagnosis).

Cervical-Cancer-Screening.json.notes: Cervical cancer screening CDS based on USPSTF 2018. Checks females age 21-65 with no cervical cytology (Pap smear) in the past 3 years.

Lung-Cancer-Screening.json.notes: Lung cancer screening CDS based on USPSTF 2021. Checks adults age 50-80 with active smoking history and no LDCT scan in the past 1 year.

AAA-Screening.json.notes: Abdominal aortic aneurysm screening CDS based on USPSTF 2019. Checks males age 65-75 with smoking history who have never had a prior AAA ultrasound screening.

Alcohol-Misuse-Screening.json.notes: Alcohol misuse screening CDS based on USPSTF 2018. Checks adults 18+ with no AUDIT-C or equivalent alcohol screening in the past 1 year.

Falls-Prevention-Screening.json.notes: Falls prevention screening CDS based on USPSTF 2018. Checks adults 65+ with no falls risk assessment performed in the past 1 year.

Tobacco-Use-Screening.json.notes: Tobacco use screening CDS based on USPSTF 2021. Checks adults 18+ with no tobacco use screening performed in the past 1 year.

Colorectal-Cancer-Average-Risk-Screening.notes: INVALID CASE: Code uses age >= 60 (Guideline requires 45+) and 2-year lookback (Guideline requires 1 year for annual FOBT-based screening).

Anxiety-Screening.json.notes: INVALID CASE: Code uses 6-month lookback for anxiety screening (Guideline requires 1 year per USPSTF 2023 recommendation).

HIV-Screening.json.notes: INVALID CASE: Code uses age >= 30 (Guideline requires 15+) and has no upper age limit of 65, missing adolescents and younger adults from the screening population.

Prediabetes-Obesity-Screening.json.notes: INVALID CASE: Code uses BMI >= 35 kg/m2 (obese-only threshold; Guideline requires >= 25 kg/m2 overweight+obese) and 1-year lookback for glucose testing (Guideline requires 3 years).

Cervical-Cancer-Screening-WrongAge.json.notes: INVALID CASE (parametric): Lower age threshold changed from 21 to 30 — misses women aged 21-29 who should be screened per USPSTF 2018.

Depression-Screening-WrongLookback.json.notes: INVALID CASE (parametric): Lookback period changed from 1 year to 3 months — would trigger excessive re-screening, not aligned with annual USPSTF recommendation.

Falls-Prevention-WrongAge.json.notes: INVALID CASE (parametric): Age threshold changed from 65 to 75 — misses adults aged 65-74 who should be screened per USPSTF 2018.

Alcohol-Misuse-WrongAge.json.notes: INVALID CASE (parametric): Age threshold changed from 18 to 25 — misses adults aged 18-24 who should be screened per USPSTF 2018.

Osteoporosis-WrongLookback.json.notes: INVALID CASE (parametric): Lookback period changed from 2 years to 6 months — would trigger excessive re-screening with DEXA, not aligned with USPSTF/CMS249 recommendation.

AAA-Screening-WrongAge.json.notes: INVALID CASE (parametric): Lower age changed from 65 to 55 — screens men 55-64 who are outside the USPSTF 2019 recommended range of 65-75.

Breast-Cancer-WrongOperator.json.notes: INVALID CASE (semantic): Inner AND changed to OR in MeetsInclusionCriteria — patient qualifies if female OR age>=40 (instead of AND), incorrectly screening males or underage patients.

Tobacco-Missing-Exclusion.json.notes: INVALID CASE (semantic): Removed the lookback period check for prior tobacco screening — ALL adults 18+ are flagged regardless of whether they were already screened in the past year.

Lung-Cancer-Missing-SubPopulation.json.notes: INVALID CASE (semantic): Removed upper age bound of 80 from demographic check — screens all smokers age 50+ with no upper limit, contrary to USPSTF 2021 range of 50-80.
